description: You are a Foley editor aligning sound effects to picture for a film's winter scene. Using the spotting notes and raw Foley audio at /home/ga/Audio/foley_elements/, update the Ardour session 'MyProject' to include a track named 'Synced Footsteps'. This track must contain four distinct footsteps extracted from the raw recording, each trimmed to under 2.0 seconds and precisely aligned to start at 5.0s, 10.0s, 15.0s, and 20.0s on the timeline. The final session should be saved with the track cleaned of any unused audio portions.
